columns.name: formulanumeric
columns.label: Formula (Numeric)
columns.formula: CASE  WHEN {unit} LIKE '12 oz Bag' THEN {quantity} * .75 WHEN {unit} LIKE '2 oz Bag' THEN {quantity} * .125 WHEN {unit} LIKE '5 lb Bag' THEN {quantity} * 5 ELSE 0 END

columns.name: formulanumeric
columns.label: Formula (Numeric)
columns.formula: SUM(     CASE          WHEN {unit} LIKE '12 oz Bag' THEN NVL({quantitycommitted},0) * 0.75         WHEN {unit} LIKE '2 oz Bag' THEN NVL({quantitycommitted},0) * 0.125         WHEN {unit} LIKE '5 lb Bag' THEN NVL({quantitycommitted},0) * 5         ELSE 0     END )

columns.name: formulanumeric
columns.label: Formula (Numeric)
columns.formula: CASE  WHEN {custcolcustcol9} = 'Roasting' AND {unit} LIKE '12 oz Bag' THEN GREATEST(NVL({quantity},0) - NVL({quantitycommitted},0),0) * 0.75 WHEN {custcolcustcol9} = 'Roasting' AND {unit} LIKE '2 oz Bag' THEN GREATEST(NVL({quantity},0) - NVL({quantitycommitted},0),0) * 0.125 WHEN {custcolcustcol9} = 'Roasting' AND {unit} LIKE '5 lb Bag' THEN GREATEST(NVL({quantity},0) - NVL({quantitycommitted},0),0) * 5 ELSE 0 END

columns.name: formulanumeric
columns.label: Formula (Numeric)
columns.formula: GREATEST(     SUM(         CASE              WHEN {unit} LIKE '12 oz Bag' THEN NVL({quantity},0) * 0.75             WHEN {unit} LIKE '2 oz Bag' THEN NVL({quantity},0) * 0.125             WHEN {unit} LIKE '5 lb Bag' THEN NVL({quantity},0) * 5             ELSE 0         END     )     -     SUM(         CASE              WHEN {unit} LIKE '12 oz Bag' THEN NVL({quantitycommitted},0) * 0.75             WHEN {unit} LIKE '2 oz Bag' THEN NVL({quantitycommitted},0) * 0.125             WHEN {unit} LIKE '5 lb Bag' THEN NVL({quantitycommitted},0) * 5             ELSE 0         END     )     -     SUM(         CASE              WHEN {custcolcustcol9} = 'Roasting' AND {unit} LIKE '12 oz Bag' THEN NVL({quantity},0) * 0.75             WHEN {custcolcustcol9} = 'Roasting' AND {unit} LIKE '2 oz Bag' THEN NVL({quantity},0) * 0.125             WHEN {custcolcustcol9} = 'Roasting' AND {unit} LIKE '5 lb Bag' THEN NVL({quantity},0) * 5             ELSE 0         END     ), 0 )

_note: Captured at end of Phase 5 smoke test; semantic column meaning by index: 0=blend name, 1=Total Coffee Needed in lbs, 2=Coffee Committed in lbs, 3=Coffee Roasting in lbs, 4=Coffee to Roast or Pack in lbs
